zh.Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德
zh.Holy Trinity Church, Sutton Coldfield, W: 英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon於大約1360年出生在英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德。她和Walter Harman至少有1個兒子。她去世於1380年之後在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon于大约1360年出生在英国瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德。她和Walter Harman至少有1个儿子。她去世于1380年之后在她的家乡，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Harman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southeast), Dutch, and Czech: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’ (see Hermann ). In England this name was introduced by the Normans.
Irish: variant of   Hargadon  .
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): perhaps a nickname for someone with a copious or noticeable head of hair (see   Haar  ).

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam.

Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Herman
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, Flemish, Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. Compare Harman 5.
Americanized form of German   Hermann  , a cognate of 1 above.
English: perhaps a shortened form of Herniman, a topographic name for a ‘dweller (in a) nook or corner of land’, from Middle English herne, hirne, hurne + man. See also Hearn .

variants.name: Hermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Jurgen, Mathias, Gottlieb, Horst, Juergen, Klaus, Lorenz, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Harman 5.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German name (see 1 above). Compare   Herman  .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).
Chinese: variant of   Ge  .

nameMeanings.name: Harmon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Herman, adopted from ancient Germanic Hariman, Her(e)man, composed of elements meaning ‘army’ + ‘man’.
Irish: variant of   Hargadon  .
Americanized form of German   Harmann   or   Hermann  . Compare   Harman  .

variants.name: Harmond
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Harmon  .

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam.

Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Harmony
meanings: Variant of   Harmon  , a surname of German origin.
English: unexplained. This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon was born about 1360, in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England. She had at least 1 son with Walter Harman. She died after 1380, in her hometown, and was buried in Holy Trinity Church, Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England.

ja.Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールド
ja.Holy Trinity Church, Sutton Coldfield, W: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールドホーリー トリニトイ チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Walter Harman or Harmonは約1360年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールドで生まれた。彼女はWalter Harmanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1380年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールドホーリー トリニトイ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Church, Sutton Coldfield, W: 영국 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드 홀이 트리니티 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon(은)는 대략 1360년 영국 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Walter Harman(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드 홀이 트리니티 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon родилась около 1360 г. в местности суттон колдфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Walter Harman. Она умерла после 1380 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности холи тринити чурч, суттон колдфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия.
